'''鈭歬-t-l''' ('''kakatal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loblolly|loblolly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loblolly|loblolly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-t-l
|-
! Lemma
| kakatal
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikatal|thikatal]] || [[word:jikatal|jikatal]] || [[word:shikatal|shikatal]] || [[word:kikatal|kikatal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukatal|thuthukatal]] || [[word:jujukatal|jujukatal]] || [[word:shushukatal|shushukatal]] || [[word:kukukatal|kukukatal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukatal|thukatal]] || [[word:jukatal|jukatal]] || [[word:shukatal|shukatal]] || [[word:kukatal|kukatal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukatal|thukatal]] || [[word:jukatal|jukatal]] || [[word:shukatal|shukatal]] || [[word:kukatal|kukatal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekatal|thekatal]] || [[word:jekatal|jekatal]] || [[word:shekatal|shekatal]] || [[word:kekatal|kekatal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokatal|thothokatal]] || [[word:jojokatal|jojokatal]] || [[word:shoshokatal|shoshokatal]] || [[word:kokokatal|kokokatal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatal|thokatal]] || [[word:jokatal|jokatal]] || [[word:shokatal|shokatal]] || [[word:kokatal|kokatal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatal|thokatal]] || [[word:jokatal|jokatal]] || [[word:shokatal|shokatal]] || [[word:kokatal|kokatal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]] || [[word:katal|katal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙katal|th忙katal]] || [[word:j忙katal|j忙katal]] || [[word:sh忙katal|sh忙katal]] || [[word:k忙katal|k忙katal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakatal|thathakatal]] || [[word:jajakatal|jajakatal]] || [[word:shashakatal|shashakatal]] || [[word:kakakatal|kakakatal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakatal|thakatal]] || [[word:jakatal|jakatal]] || [[word:shakatal|shakatal]] || [[word:kakatal|kakatal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakatal|thakatal]] || [[word:jakatal|jakatal]] || [[word:shakatal|shakatal]] || [[word:kakatal|kakatal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakatal|shakatal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakatal|goshakatal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakatal|gokishakatal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakataln眉|shakataln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakatalnkn眉|goshakatalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakataln眉|gokishakataln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakatalsh毛|shakatalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakatalnksh毛|goshakatalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakatalsh毛|gokishakatalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatalro|shakatalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatalnkro|goshakatalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatalro|gokishakatalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatalmu|shakatalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatalnkmu|goshakatalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatalmu|gokishakatalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakatalsher|shakatalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakatalnksher|goshakatalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakatalsher|gokishakatalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakatalng|shakatalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakatalnkng|goshakatalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakatalng|gokishakatalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakatalya|shakatalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakatalnkya|goshakatalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakatalya|gokishakatalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakatalyam|shakatalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakatalnkyam|goshakatalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakatalyam|gokishakatalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakataln眉sh毛|shakataln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatalnkn眉sh毛|goshakatalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakataln眉sh毛|gokishakataln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakataln眉ro|shakataln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatalnkn眉ro|goshakatalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakataln眉ro|gokishakataln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakataln眉mu|shakataln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatalnkn眉mu|goshakatalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakataln眉mu|gokishakataln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatalsh毛n眉|shakatalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatalnksh毛n眉|goshakatalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatalsh毛n眉|gokishakatalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatalsh毛ro|shakatalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatalnksh毛ro|goshakatalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatalsh毛ro|gokishakatalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatalsh毛mu|shakatalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatalnksh毛mu|goshakatalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatalsh毛mu|gokishakatalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatalron眉|shakatalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatalnkron眉|goshakatalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatalron眉|gokishakatalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatalrosh毛|shakatalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatalnkrosh毛|goshakatalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatalrosh毛|gokishakatalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatalromu|shakatalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatalnkromu|goshakatalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatalromu|gokishakatalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatalmun眉|shakatalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatalnkmun眉|goshakatalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatalmun眉|gokishakatalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatalmush毛|shakatalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatalnkmush毛|goshakatalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatalmush毛|gokishakatalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatalmuro|shakatalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatalnkmuro|goshakatalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatalmuro|gokishakatalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
